notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Willi Castro to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Edouard Julien. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.
